name: components/text-field
description: A comprehensive text-input component supporting single-line inputs, multi-line textareas, labels, descriptions, and error messages. Provides a complete composition system with TextField, TextFieldInput, TextFieldTextArea, TextFieldLabel, TextFieldDescription, and TextFieldErrorMessage. Includes built-in file-input styling, focus-visible rings, invalid-state borders, and an error-list renderer for form-validation libraries. Built on Kobalte TextField with full ARIA support.
useCases: Registration and login forms with email, password, and username single-line fields
Contact or support forms using TextFieldTextArea for multi-line message bodies
Inline editing cells in data tables where validation errors appear below the input
Search bars and command palettes with focus-visible rings and clear-button integration
usage: import { TextField, TextFieldInput, TextFieldTextArea, TextFieldLabel, TextFieldDescription, TextFieldErrorMessage } from "shadcn-solid-components/components/text-field"
